---
title: "Pitch Lab"
description: "MLB pitch arsenals, movement, discipline, and sequencing."
---

::: {.page-intro}
<span class="eyebrow">Pitch design, translated</span>

# How an arsenal creates the result

Velocity and movement matter. So do location, the previous pitch, the hitter’s handedness, and the count.
:::

{{< include includes/pitch-lab.html >}}
